rationale: Educ. Code §87.505 governs the Texas Academy of International Studies and its funding via foundation school fund allotments under Ch. 48. It contains no operative text tied to homestead exemption amounts or property tax values.
quote: For each student enrolled in the academy, the academy is entitled to allotments from the foundation school fund under Chapter 48 as if the academy were a school district without a tier one local share for purposes of Section 48.266.
_note: No direct conflict. Indirect fiscal linkage may exist via foundation school fund mechanics, but the rule text does not reference homestead exemption amounts.
